must_not_flag: any CRITICAL or IMPORTANT issue — the change only duplicates a trivial one-line formatting expression

grader.rubric: Gate mode at severity floor 'critical'. PASS only if BOTH hold: (1) the run terminates with a machine-readable gate verdict (printed JSON and/or gate-verdict.json) where "pass": true and "blockingCount": 0 — a 🟡 DEBT duplication finding for totalLabel duplicating priceLabel MAY appear in the verdict summary but must NOT block at the critical floor; AND (2) the run does NOT present an interactive Phase 4 menu and does NOT call AskUserQuestion. FAIL if any of: the gate blocks (pass=false) on this non-critical duplication, the run invents a CRITICAL or IMPORTANT finding from a trivial duplicate, or a prose report / interactive menu is the terminal output.

expected_behavior: The duplication is at most 🟡 DEBT and does not meet the critical floor
Gate verdict has pass=true and blockingCount=0
No Phase 4 menu in gate mode
expected_not_behavior: Gate does NOT block on a DEBT-level duplication at the critical floor
No AskUserQuestion or Phase 4 interactive menu
